name: Green Beans New Southern Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the green beans and snip off their ends. Place them in a pot of salted boiling water. Reduce the heat and cook until they are barely tender. Drain the beans immediately into a colander.
2. Rinse the cooked beans under cold running water to stop the cooking process.
3. Cook the bacon slices over low heat in a deep heavy pot until crisp. Remove the cooked bacon, drain it on paper towels, and crumble it.
4. Pour off all but 2 tablespoons of bacon fat from the pot. When ready to serve, heat the remaining fat in the pot, add the beans, and fork-stir until heated through. Stir in the crumbled bacon and serve immediately.
